## Summary

Describe the change and the agent/user workflow it improves.

## Safety

- [ ] This keeps the project explicitly unofficial.
- [ ] This does not claim official Garmin Health API partner access unless the change implements that mode explicitly.
- [ ] This does not expose Garmin passwords, tokens, raw GPS exports or private health/activity payloads.
- [ ] This preserves read-only behavior unless the change is explicitly about local disconnect.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Relevant docs updated
